statement.description: A verifiable fact, e.g. 'the water pipe on the plot is plastic, 32mm'.

source.description: Where the fact came from (a person, a document, an observation).

valid_from.description: Start of validity (ISO-8601), for temporal facts.

valid_to.description: End of validity (ISO-8601); unset = still valid.

supersedes.description: dedupKey/id of an earlier fact this replaces (ADD-only: don't overwrite, supersede).
